entities.keeper: a lighthouse keeper at the top
entities.boat: a small boat in the harbor below

scenes.title: The Lighthouse
scenes.background_prompt: A tall white lighthouse on a rocky cliff, a winding path, a small harbor with stone walls below, and a dramatic sky with clouds. No people, no boats.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A dramatic coastal scene under a sky of towering gray clouds with breaks of golden light. A tall white lighthouse with a red-painted top and a glass lantern room stands at the edge of a rocky cliff. At the very top, visible through the glass of the lantern room, a lighthouse keeper in a dark blue peacoat and a wool cap stands with one hand on the railing of the narrow walkway that circles the lantern, looking out over the sea. His position is unmistakably at the very summit of the lighthouse. Far below, in the small stone-walled harbor at the base of the cliff, a small wooden fishing boat with a blue hull bobs on the choppy water, tied to a rusted iron bollard. A winding stone path connects the lighthouse door to the harbor. Waves crash white against the rocks at the cliff base.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place keeper inside the glass lantern room at the very top of the lighthouse, standing with one hand on the railing of the narrow walkway, looking out over the sea. Place boat in the small harbor at the base of the cliff, tied to a bollard, bobbing on choppy water.
scenes.scene_description: In the lower-left foreground, a curved stone breakwater made of grey blocks extends into the light blue water, with a thick brown rope tied between two wooden bollards. To its right, a grassy hillside is covered in green clovers, white daisies, and small yellow flowers, through which a light brown dirt path with scattered grey stones winds upward. In the harbor area behind the breakwater, a boat with a white hull, a blue trim line, and a wooden cabin is moored near two small wooden piers. Two small brown wooden sheds with gabled roofs sit on the flat stone surface of the harbor; one has a fishing net draped beside it. A set of stone stairs leads from the harbor level up the side of a grassy cliff. Atop the cliff stands a tall white lighthouse with a red conical roof and a black railing around its observation deck. A keeper, dressed in a dark blue coat and hat, stands on the deck looking through a telescope toward the left. A small white building with a red roof is nestled at the base of the lighthouse. To the right of the lighthouse, the dirt path continues toward a stone cottage with a red-tiled roof, a chimney, and a wooden door, which is attached to a smaller wooden outbuilding. Behind the houses, several rounded trees with green, yellow, and orange foliage grow. In the far background, a range of soft blue mountains sits on the horizon under a pale blue sky filled with numerous large, fluffy white and grey clouds. The scene is depicted in a bright, clear daylight setting.

CH: keeper in a dark blue coat
keeper wearing a small blue hat
S: tall white lighthouse on a cliff
calm blue harbor with stone breakwater
IE: keeper spots something through his telescope
boat arrives at the quiet harbor
P: keeper wants to watch for ships
boat captain wants to dock safely
A: path winding up the grassy hill
CO: keeper knows what is happening at sea

ENP: tall white lighthouse with red roof
curved stone breakwater with thick rope
small wooden sheds with gabled roofs
SC: because he is watching the sea
